message: Hello! I would love to book a private slot or schedule an appointment tomorrow afternoon. However, your quoted price seems way higher than what was advertised.
summary: Customer unhappy with quote, requested manager.
suggested_response: I understand your concern about the pricing, Sarah. Let me connect you with a manager right away to look into this for you.

timeline.event: SOP Checked: Booking / Pricing Keywords Found

message: Voicemail left: Interested in scheduling an after-hours property tour this weekend.
summary: Inbound call missed during off-hours regarding tour booking.
suggested_response: Hi John, sorry we missed your call! I see you are interested in a weekend tour. Would Saturday at 2 PM work?

message: Please send over your standard corporate enterprise deck and tier-2 service level agreement documents.
summary: Corporate client asking for basic documentation pack.
suggested_response: Hello Elena, thank you for reaching out. Attached is our corporate deck and standard SLA framework.
